title: Creative Direction & Styled Setups
intro: Some shoots need more than a location. They need a concept, a feeling and a visual story.
body: Shaney offers creative direction and styled setup support for clients who want their shoot to feel intentional and beautifully put together. She develops the visual concept, guides the styling, composition and lighting, and can arrange props or décor at an additional cost where a concept calls for them — helping shape the scene before capturing the story. This is especially valuable for brands, families, creators and businesses that need photography and social media content with a clear visual identity. Creative direction is a separately paid service offered alongside photography; it is not booked as a standalone set-building service.
note: Creative direction is a separately paid service, offered only alongside photography. Props and décor can be arranged at an additional cost where a concept calls for them. It cannot be booked as a standalone set-building service.
